name: kde-computer-use
description: Isolated-default, state-scoped KDE Wayland Computer Use with justified foreground access, AT-SPI semantics, and transactional actions.

interface.shortDescription: Use state-scoped AT-SPI and transactional actions on KDE Wayland
interface.longDescription: Computer Use v2 gives Codex one state-scoped protocol across foreground and isolated KDE Wayland targets. Observations bind exact roots, epochs, window-image coordinates, and AT-SPI refs. Transactions prefer semantic Action and EditableText interfaces, verify postconditions, and use a focus-preserving foreground lease for KDE RemoteDesktop input. Fresh apps can run in a self-owned KWin virtual session with private Wayland, Xwayland, D-Bus, AT-SPI, HOME, XDG directories, ScreenShot2 capture, KWin EIS input, and systemd cgroup lifecycle ownership.
defaultPrompt: Open a fresh app in an isolated session
Act on a window and verify the result
Find visible windows and tray apps
